name: Chocolate Meringue Pie2
recipeInstructions:
Pie: Combine dry ingredients in a medium saucepan and stir to mix thoroughly before adding liquids. Add egg yolks (save whites for the meringue) and milk, and whisk until there are no lumps. Place over medium-low heat and stir constantly until the pudding thickens and comes to a gentle boil. Watch it closely and do not increase the heat; otherwise, it may stick or burn. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla and butter. Pour into baked pie shell. Top with meringue.
Meringue: Beat egg whites and all other ingredients except sugar until foamy. Add sugar one tablespoon at a time while beating vigorously until the whites form a firm peak and are glossy. Spread meringue over the hot filling, starting at the edges and sealing around the crust. Spread remaining meringue over the pie, creating hills and valleys. Adding sugar gradually helps ensure complete dissolution and prevents weeping.
